dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S5024 IS: Stop PRC Economic Espionage Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cornyn (for himself and Mr. Cotton) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to provide that an entity domiciled in a foreign adversary country is a foreign instrumentality for purposes of the prohibition on economic espionage.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Stop PRC Economic Espionage Act of 2026.

section.header: Definition of foreign instrumentality for purposes of economic espionage prohibition
section.text: Section 1839(1) of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking that is substantially owned and inserting the following: “that is—
by adding at the end the following: “or

subparagraph.text: domiciled in a covered nation, as defined in section 4872 of title 10;
